AiEvaluationDefinition.name: SearchDataLibrary
AiEvaluationDefinition.description: Answers company-document questions via ExploreDataCloud + SearchDataLibrary

inputs.utterance: what is our company discount policy for deals over $100K? check the company docs

expectation.name: bot_response_rating
expectation.expectedValue: Mentions that discounts above 10 percent require VP of Sales approval
